mapper.sql: select bt.id, bt.name, bt.description, bt.color, bt.icon, bt.create_time, bt.update_time, bt.del_flag, COUNT(DISTINCT bat.article_id) as article_count from blog_tag bt left join blog_article_tag bat on bt.id = bat.tag_id left join blog_article ba on bat.article_id = ba.id and ba.status = 1 and ba.del_flag = 0
mapper.select:
and bt.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%') and bt.del_flag = 0
group by bt.id, bt.name, bt.description, bt.color, bt.icon, bt.create_time, bt.update_time, bt.del_flag order by bt.create_time desc
where bt.del_flag = 0 group by bt.id, bt.name, bt.description, bt.color, bt.icon, bt.create_time, bt.update_time, bt.del_flag order by bt.create_time desc
where bt.id = #{id} and bt.del_flag = 0 group by bt.id, bt.name, bt.description, bt.color, bt.icon, bt.create_time, bt.update_time, bt.del_flag
where bt.name = #{name} and bt.del_flag = 0 group by bt.id, bt.name, bt.description, bt.color, bt.icon, bt.create_time, bt.update_time, bt.del_flag limit 1
select count(1) from blog_article_tag where tag_id = #{tagId}

SELECT bt.id, bt.name, bt.color, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ba.status = 1 AND ba.del_flag = 0 THEN bat.article_id END) as article_count FROM blog_tag bt LEFT JOIN blog_article_tag bat ON bt.id = bat.tag_id LEFT JOIN blog_article ba ON bat.article_id = ba.id WHERE bt.del_flag = 0 GROUP BY bt.id, bt.name, bt.color ORDER BY article_count DESC, bt.create_time DESC

select bt.id, bt.name, bt.description, bt.color, bt.icon, bt.create_time, bt.update_time, bt.del_flag, COUNT(DISTINCT bat2.article_id) as article_count from blog_tag bt inner join blog_article_tag bat on bt.id = bat.tag_id left join blog_article_tag bat2 on bt.id = bat2.tag_id left join blog_article ba on bat2.article_id = ba.id and ba.status = 1 and ba.del_flag = 0 where bat.article_id = #{articleId} and bt.del_flag = 0 group by bt.id, bt.name, bt.description, bt.color, bt.icon, bt.create_time, bt.update_time, bt.del_flag
mapper.insert:
insert into blog_tag
name, description, color, icon, del_flag,
#{name}, #{description}, #{color}, #{icon}, #{delFlag},
mapper.delete: update blog_tag set del_flag = 1 where id = #{id}

update blog_tag set del_flag = 1 where id in
#{id}
